header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.text: Dëcouvi les recètes di tot l'monde
header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Tchûz des recètes autenticådes des cwîcines do monde entou l'monde
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Nom del ricete do Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Bouyon d osse di porc ric avou d tchashu tendre, ouf molèt, eyet nouilles freûdes.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Nom del ricete do Pizza Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza napolitaine classike avou des tomates San Marzano, mozzarella freûde eyet basilic.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Nom del ricete do Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos di porc mariné avou d pineûpe, coriandre eyet ognon so des tortillas di blé.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Descrîption del ricete Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Nom del ricete do Pôlet a l'Beurre.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Pôlet tendre dins ene sauce crémêye di tomate eyet beurre avou des épices aromatiquès.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Descrîption del ricete Pôlet a l'Beurre.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Nom del ricete do Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Nouilles di riz sautêyes avou des crevettes, tofu, cacahouètes eyet sauce tamarin.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Nom del ricete do Crêpes francesès.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crêpes finesses eyet delicates plenes avou du Nutella, des fraises freûdes eyet de la crème fouettée.

locale_switcher_label.description: Accessible label for the language switcher dropdown in the header.

locale_switcher_en.description: English language option in the locale switcher.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Japanese language option in the locale switcher.

locale_switcher_es.description: Spanish language option in the locale switcher.
